negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: physics_129
prompt: The video opens with a close-up view of a hand holding a small, round opal gemstone. The opal is predominantly white with vibrant, swirling patterns of red, orange, and green hues. The hand, belonging to an adult, gently rotates the opal, allowing the viewer to see its intricate play of colors from various angles. The background is dark, which enhances the vividness of the opal's colors and makes them stand out prominently. The lighting is focused on the opal, creating a bright spot that highlights its reflective surface and the dynamic interplay of light and color within it. The hand holding the opal remains steady, and the camera movement is smooth and steady, ensuring that the opal remains the central point of interest throughout the sequence. The opal continues to rotate slowly, showcasing its mesmerizing colors and patterns, while the dark background and focused lighting emphasize its beauty and complexity.
